payload.proposal: Acknowledge the chat request, publish a short plan, ask only blocking questions, then run the selected workflow.
Keep event destinations separate from internal workflow mail and validate the event binding before enabling it.

spec: Send received and plan replies through chat output destinations.
Skip workflow start when required task input is missing.
Route review requests to Workflow A and Workflow B chat destinations.

payload.toWorkflowA: Review whether the plan is natural for the user.
payload.toWorkflowB: Review whether event/output separation and validation are sufficient.

payload.summary: Chat task planning and multi-supervisor collaboration are represented as external event/output flows around normal workflow execution.
